name: Unstable
ability: You think you are the Kazali, but you are not. The Kazali knows who you are & who you choose at night. [+the Kazali. You choose which players think they are which Minions, but are not]
flavor: F7a99ed: [t]he mac41na[t]10n. M3china[t]i0n. Si9h[t]s abound. |>rif[t] [t]h20ugh [t]he soun|>. R#212t [t]emp[t]a[t]10n. D##per. (v1.0)
firstNightReminder: Show the Unstable the *THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY* token. Show 3 good character tokens. The Unstable chooses which players think they are which Minions. Put the Unstable to sleep. Wake each target. Show the *YOU ARE* and Minion tokens & give a thumbs-down. Wake the Kazali. Show the *YOU ARE* info token and the Kazali token. Show the *THIS PLAYER IS* info token and the Unstable token, then point to the Unstable. Point to the players the Unstable chose.
otherNightReminder: The Unstable chooses a player. Put the Unstable to sleep. Wake the Kazali. Show the Unstable token & point to them, then their target.
